name: Adesina Abdurraheem
message: Baraka Llahu feekum! Everything I can say about Home of Khayr Computer is Ma sha Allah! Especially timeliness, it's a so swift and topnotch. I really got what I ordered for. May Allah subhaanahu-wa-ta'lla continue bless their business.

name: Taiye Zubair
message: Hok computers is trustworthy, because I paid in installment for almost three months, and as I completed the payment they delivered the system to me.The system is neat and the battery is durable plus free delivery
